steps.title: Solve for t
steps.content: Divide by $-2$: $t+3=-19$, then subtract $3$: $t=-22$. The answer is -22.

steps.title: Use the source rationale
steps.content: The correct answer is $-22$. The given equation can be rewritten as $-2\left(t+3\right)=38$. Dividing both sides of this equation by $-2$ yields $t+3=-19$. Subtracting $3$ from both sides of this equation yields $t=-22$. Therefore, $-22$ is the value of $t$ that is the solution to the given equation.
